LanguageData.AutoDrillPowerModeDesc: Switch the auto drill's power source. External power consumes 1000 W; solar power needs no grid connection, but only works in daylight without roof coverage.
LanguageData.AutoDrillOperatingModeDesc: Cycle drilling modes. High speed retains the current speed and mineral loss; high precision recovers all minerals at 1/3 efficiency; safe mode retains mineral loss, runs at 1/2 efficiency, and cannot cause infestations.
